channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16402] parallel-scale-nfsv3 test_compilebench: DQACQ failed with -22
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/39feb255-f12b-45e3-a3ef-d149d1ef571b

test_compilebench failed with the following error:

Timeout occurred after 578 minutes, last suite running was parallel-scale-nfsv3

OSS console

[Mon Dec 12 08:09:23 2022] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark == parallel-scale-nfsv3 test compilebench: compilebench == 08:09:25 \(1670832565\)
[Mon Dec 12 08:09:23 2022] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == parallel-scale-nfsv3 test compilebench: compilebench == 08:09:25 (1670832565)
[Mon Dec 12 08:09:24 2022] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark .\/compilebench -D \/mnt\/lustre\/d0.parallel-scale-nfs\/d0.compilebench.728134 -i 2         -r 2 --makej
[Mon Dec 12 08:09:25 2022] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: ./compilebench -D /mnt/lustre/d0.parallel-scale-nfs/d0.compilebench.728134 -i 2 -r 2 --makej
[Mon Dec 12 09:13:09 2022] LustreError: 16309:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4  qsd:lustre-OST0000 qtype:grp id:500 enforced:1 granted: 262144 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage: 0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0 default:no
[Mon Dec 12 09:13:16 2022] LustreError: 16308:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4  qsd:lustre-OST0001 qtype:grp id:500 enforced:1 granted: 262144 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage: 0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0 default:no
[Mon Dec 12 09:13:16 2022] LustreError: 16308:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) Skipped 1 previous similar message
[Mon Dec 12 09:14:12 2022] LustreError: 16309:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4  qsd:lustre-OST0000 qtype:grp id:500 enforced:1 granted: 262144 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage: 0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0 default:no
[Mon Dec 12 09:14:16 2022] LustreError: 16309:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4  qsd:lustre-OST0001 qtype:grp id:500 enforced:1 granted: 262144 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage: 0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0 default:no
[Mon Dec 12 09:14:16 2022] LustreError: 16309:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) Skipped 1 previous similar message
[Mon Dec 12 09:15:13 2022] LustreError: 16308:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4  qsd:lustre-OST0000 qtype:grp id:500 enforced:1 granted: 262144 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage: 0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0 default:no
[Mon Dec 12 09:16:15 2022] LustreError: 16308:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4  qsd:lustre-OST0000 qtype:usr id:500 enforced:1 granted: 262144 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage: 0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0 default:no
[Mon Dec 12 09:16:15 2022] LustreError: 16308:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) Skipped 2 previous similar messages
[Mon Dec 12 09:17:16 2022] LustreError: 16308:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4  qsd:lustre-OST0000 qtype:grp id:500 enforced:1 granted: 262144 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage: 0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0 default:no
[Mon Dec 12 09:17:16 2022] LustreError: 16308:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) Skipped 1 previous similar message
[Mon Dec 12 09:18:18 2022] LustreError: 16309:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4  qsd:lustre-OST0000 qtype:grp id:500 enforced:1 granted: 262144 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage: 0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0 default:no
[Mon Dec 12 09:18:18 2022] LustreError: 16309:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) Skipped 1 previous similar message
[Mon Dec 12 09:19:23 2022] LustreError: 16308:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4  qsd:lustre-OST0001 qtype:grp id:500 enforced:1 granted: 262144 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage: 0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0 default:no
[Mon Dec 12 09:19:23 2022] LustreError: 16308:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) Skipped 4 previous similar messages
[Mon Dec 12 09:22:23 2022] LustreError: 16308:0:(qsd_handler.c:340:qsd_req_completion()) $$$ DQACQ failed with -22, flags:0x4  qsd:lustre-OST0000 qtype:grp id:500 enforced:1 granted: 262144 pending:0 waiting:0 req:1 usage: 0 qunit:0 qtune:0 edquot:0 default:no

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
parallel-scale-nfsv3 test_compilebench - Timeout occurred after 578 minutes, last suite running was parallel-scale-nfsv3

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
